children.text: Please confirm your delivery address is covered by our delivery area.
If you are setting spam mail filter by domain, please add the following domain to the safe domain list: [sp.mdj.jp]
Yes, I have read and agree to the following policies:
I would like to receive commercial promotion and new products information from McDonald's through e-mail or SMS.
I confirm that I am at least 18 years of age, or that if I am below 18 years of age, my parent / legal guardian has given their consent to the aforesaid.*
A verification code will be sent to you to confirm your account. Please select where you'd like the code to be sent to.
